scripts.run:dev: corepack pnpm run genver && corepack pnpm run ts:run src/index.ts
scripts.official-pp:publish:win: dotnet publish official-pp-helper/official-pp-helper.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:IncludeNativeLibrariesForSelfExtract=true -o dist/target/official-pp/win-x64
scripts.official-pp:publish:linux: dotnet publish official-pp-helper/official-pp-helper.csproj -c Release -r linux-x64 --self-contained true -p:PublishSingleFile=true -p:IncludeNativeLibrariesForSelfExtract=true -o dist/target/official-pp/linux-x64
scripts.compile:win: corepack pnpm run genver && corepack pnpm run ts:compile && corepack pnpm run compile:prepare-htmls && corepack pnpm run official-pp:publish:win && corepack pnpm run build:overlay:win && pkg --output dist/tosu.exe --debug --config pkg.win.json --compress brotli dist/index.js && corepack pnpm run ts:run src/postBuild.ts && corepack pnpm run prepare:release:win
scripts.compile:linux: corepack pnpm run genver && corepack pnpm run ts:compile && corepack pnpm run compile:prepare-htmls && corepack pnpm run official-pp:publish:linux && pkg --output dist/tosu --debug --config pkg.linux.json --compress brotli dist/index.js
